response.justification: Candidate is massively overqualified for a junior/mid-level role with 20+ years of experience as a Staff/Senior engineer. While the technical stack alignment is strong (TypeScript, Node.js, React adjacent, SQL, Docker, Kubernetes via GISCollective), there's significant risk of misalignment on seniority expectations, salary, and the on-site requirement. No explicit Nest.js or PostgreSQL experience mentioned, and German is only basic which may matter for a German renewable energy/construction context.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js fullstack experience across many years and domains
Kubernetes, Docker, and CI/CD experience from GISCollective and Altom infrastructure work
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, testing workshops)
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level IC role — retention and engagement risk
Only basic German for a German on-site role in construction/energy consulting
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience; MongoDB and DLang are heavily featured instead

key_factors.factor: Basic German for on-site German-market role
